config.description: Contrato v1: aprendizaje manual ON unificado. Espera 25s para consolidación, usa una sola definición de contexto y aplica semántica -0.25 sin ramas legacy. Presencia telefónica limitada a `device_tracker.samsung_s24` y `person.ivan`.

variables.trace_id: {% set matches = manual_on_trace_confirmed_raw | regex_findall('trace_id=([^|]+)') %}{{ matches[0] if (matches | count) > 0 else 'trace_missing' }}
variables.active_session_trace_id: {% set matches = active_session_raw | regex_findall('trace_id=([^|]+)') %}{{ matches[0] if (matches | count) > 0 else 'trace_missing' }}
variables.active_session_status: {% set matches = active_session_raw | regex_findall('status=([^|]+)') %}{{ matches[0] if (matches | count) > 0 else 'closed' }}
variables.active_session_signature: {% set matches = active_session_raw | regex_findall('signature=([^|]+)') %}{{ matches[0] if (matches | count) > 0 else 'sig_missing' }}
variables.active_session_started_ts: {% set matches = active_session_raw | regex_findall('started_ts=([^|]+)') %}{{ matches[0] if (matches | count) > 0 else 'ts_missing' }}
variables.active_session_started_epoch: {% if active_session_started_ts in ['ts_missing','unknown','unavailable','none',''] %}{{ none }}{% else %}{{ as_timestamp(active_session_started_ts, default=none) }}{% endif %}
variables.active_session_age_s: {% if active_session_started_epoch is none %}99999{% else %}{{ (as_timestamp(now()) - (active_session_started_epoch | float)) | round(1) }}{% endif %}
variables.active_session_ttl_valid: {{ active_session_age_s | float(99999) >= 0 and active_session_age_s | float(99999) <= (manual_on_session_ttl_s | float(110)) }}
variables.snapshot_trace_id: {% set matches = manual_on_snapshot_raw | regex_findall('trace_id=([^|]+)') %}{{ matches[0] if (matches | count) > 0 else 'trace_missing' }}
variables.snapshot_event_type: {% set matches = manual_on_snapshot_raw | regex_findall('event_type=([^|]+)') %}{{ matches[0] if (matches | count) > 0 else 'event_missing' }}
variables.snapshot_final_mode: {% set matches = manual_on_snapshot_raw | regex_findall('final_mode=([^|]+)') %}{{ matches[0] if (matches | count) > 0 else 'mode_missing' }}
variables.snapshot_ts: {% set matches = manual_on_snapshot_raw | regex_findall('ts=(.+)$') %}{{ matches[0] if (matches | count) > 0 else 'ts_missing' }}
variables.snapshot_ts_epoch: {% if snapshot_ts in ['ts_missing','unknown','unavailable','none',''] %}{{ none }}{% else %}{{ as_timestamp(snapshot_ts, default=none) }}{% endif %}
variables.snapshot_age_min: {% if snapshot_ts_epoch is none %}99999{% else %}{{ ((as_timestamp(now()) - (snapshot_ts_epoch | float)) / 60) | round(1) }}{% endif %}
variables.snapshot_recent: {{ snapshot_ts_epoch is not none and (snapshot_age_min | float(99999)) >= 0 and (snapshot_age_min | float(99999)) <= (manual_feedback_max_window_min | float(120)) }}
variables.snapshot_structure_ok: {{ manual_on_snapshot_raw | length > 0 and snapshot_trace_id != 'trace_missing' and snapshot_event_type != 'event_missing' and snapshot_final_mode != 'mode_missing' and snapshot_ts != 'ts_missing' }}
variables.snapshot_trace_matches_confirmed: {{ snapshot_structure_ok and trace_id != 'trace_missing' and snapshot_trace_id == trace_id }}
variables.contract_context_key: {% set raw = states('input_text.ac_dda_last_context_bucket') | trim %}{{ raw if raw not in ['', 'unknown', 'unavailable', 'none'] else 'ctx_default:presencia' }}
variables.context_prev: {% set v = context_prev_raw | float(none) %}{{ v if v is not none else (states('input_number.ac_dda_cool_off_learned') | float(24.0)) }}
variables.minutes_since_last_auto: {% set raw = last_auto_ts_raw | default('', true) | trim %}{% if raw | lower in ['unknown','unavailable','none',''] %}99999{% else %}{% set ts_auto = as_timestamp(raw, default=none) %}{{ 99999 if ts_auto is none else (((as_timestamp(now()) - ts_auto) / 60) | round(1)) }}{% endif %}
variables.manual_event_trace_id: {% set matches = last_manual_event_type_raw | regex_findall('trace_id=([^|]+)') %}{{ matches[0] if (matches | count) > 0 else 'trace_missing' }}
variables.strict_session_trace_match: {{ active_session_trace_id != 'trace_missing' and snapshot_trace_id == active_session_trace_id and trace_id == active_session_trace_id and trace_id_matches_confirmed }}
variables.trace_mismatch_cross_run: {{ snapshot_structure_ok and (trace_id == 'trace_missing' or snapshot_trace_id != trace_id or not trace_id_matches_confirmed or not strict_session_trace_match) }}
variables.manual_event_confirmed: {{ snapshot_ok and not trace_mismatch_cross_run and session_trace_and_ttl_ok }}
variables.transition_ts_epoch: {% if transition_ts_raw | lower in ['unknown','unavailable','none',''] %}{{ none }}{% else %}{{ as_timestamp(transition_ts_raw, default=none) }}{% endif %}
variables.transition_age_s: {% if transition_ts_epoch is none %}99999{% else %}{{ (as_timestamp(now()) - (transition_ts_epoch | float)) | round(1) }}{% endif %}
variables.auto_transition_token_recent: {{ transition_token_raw | length > 0 and transition_age_s | float(99999) >= 0 and transition_age_s | float(99999) <= (transition_guard_window_s | float(180)) }}
variables.last_manual_on_ts_epoch: {% if last_manual_on_ts_raw | lower in ['unknown','unavailable','none',''] %}{{ none }}{% else %}{{ as_timestamp(last_manual_on_ts_raw, default=none) }}{% endif %}
variables.last_manual_on_age_min: {% if last_manual_on_ts_epoch is none %}99999{% else %}{{ ((as_timestamp(now()) - (last_manual_on_ts_epoch | float)) / 60) | round(1) }}{% endif %}
variables.manual_on_ts_recent: {{ last_manual_on_ts_epoch is not none and (last_manual_on_age_min | float(99999)) >= 0 and (last_manual_on_age_min | float(99999)) <= (manual_feedback_max_window_min | float(120)) }}
variables.force_policy_active: {{ origin_is_manual_on and learning_day_scope_ok and final_mode_cool_required and strict_session_trace_match }}
variables.learning_apply_with_fallback: {{ learning_gate_ok and not event_already_processed and not trace_mismatch_cross_run }}
variables.tin: {% set t1 = states('sensor.lumi_lumi_weather_cuarto_temperatura') | float(none) %}{% set t2 = states('sensor.lumi_lumi_weather_coco_temperatura') | float(none) %}{{ ((t1 + t2) / 2) | round(1) if t1 is not none and t2 is not none else none }}
variables.tout: {{ tout_owm if tout_owm is not none else none }}
variables.hin: {% set h1 = states('sensor.lumi_lumi_weather_cuarto_humedad') | float(none) %}{% set h2 = states('sensor.lumi_lumi_weather_coco_humedad') | float(none) %}{{ ((h1 + h2) / 2) | round(1) if h1 is not none and h2 is not none else none }}
variables.contract_cycle_valid: {{ contract_cycle_on is not none and contract_cycle_off is not none and (contract_cycle_on | float) > (contract_cycle_off | float) and (contract_cycle_off | float) >= 22 and (contract_cycle_off | float) <= 25.7 and (contract_cycle_on | float) <= 26.2 }}
variables.normal_hysteresis_after: {% set base = 0.52 %}{% set raw = (base + (contract_context_delta_on_after_normal | float(0))) %}{{ [[raw, 1.1] | min, 0.35] | max | round(2) }}
variables.normal_on_after: {% if context_after_normal is none %}{{ none }}{% else %}{{ [[((context_after_normal | float) + (normal_hysteresis_after | float)), 26.2] | min, ((context_after_normal | float) + 0.35)] | max | round(2) }}{% endif %}
variables.tin_outside_current_contract: {{ tin is not none and contract_cycle_valid and ((tin | float) < (contract_cycle_off | float) or (tin | float) > (contract_cycle_on | float)) }}
variables.tin_outside_normal_adjusted: {{ tin is not none and normal_on_after is not none and context_after_normal is not none and ((tin | float) < (context_after_normal | float) or (tin | float) > (normal_on_after | float)) }}
variables.hard_learning_applicable: {{ learning_gate_ok and (not event_already_processed) and final_mode_cool_required and tin_outside_current_contract and tin_outside_normal_adjusted }}
variables.hard_new_on_raw: {{ tin | round(2) if tin is not none else none }}
variables.hard_new_off_raw: {{ ((tin | float) - 0.5) | round(2) if tin is not none else none }}
variables.hard_new_off_clamped: {{ [[hard_new_off_raw | float(22.0), 25.7] | min, 22.0] | max | round(2) if hard_new_off_raw is not none else none }}
variables.hard_new_on_max_clamped: {{ [hard_new_on_raw | float(26.2), 26.2] | min | round(2) if hard_new_on_raw is not none else none }}
variables.hard_new_on_clamped: {% if hard_new_off_clamped is none or hard_new_on_max_clamped is none %}{{ none }}{% else %}{{ [[hard_new_on_max_clamped | float, (hard_new_off_clamped | float) + 0.1] | max, 26.2] | min | round(2) }}{% endif %}
variables.hard_clamp_reason: {% set reasons = [] %}{% if hard_new_off_raw is not none and hard_new_off_clamped is not none and (hard_new_off_raw | float) != (hard_new_off_clamped | float) %}{% set reasons = reasons + ['off_clamped'] %}{% endif %}{% if hard_new_on_raw is not none and hard_new_on_max_clamped is not none and (hard_new_on_raw | float) != (hard_new_on_max_clamped | float) %}{% set reasons = reasons + ['on_clamped_max'] %}{% endif %}{% if hard_new_on_clamped is not none and hard_new_off_clamped is not none and (hard_new_on_clamped | float) <= (hard_new_off_clamped | float) %}{% set reasons = reasons + ['on_adjusted_gt_off'] %}{% endif %}{{ reasons | join('+') if reasons | count > 0 else 'none' }}
variables.contextual_off_candidate: {% set v = context_prev_raw | float(none) %}{{ [[v, 25.7] | min, 22.0] | max | round(2) if v is not none else none }}
variables.contextual_hysteresis_candidate: {% set base = 0.52 %}{% set raw = (base + (contract_context_delta_on | float(0))) %}{{ [[raw, 1.1] | min, 0.35] | max | round(2) if contextual_off_candidate is not none else none }}
variables.contextual_on_candidate: {% if contextual_off_candidate is none or contextual_hysteresis_candidate is none %}{{ none }}{% else %}{{ [[((contextual_off_candidate | float) + (contextual_hysteresis_candidate | float)), 26.2] | min, ((contextual_off_candidate | float) + 0.35)] | max | round(2) }}{% endif %}
variables.contextual_contract_valid: {{ contextual_on_candidate is not none and contextual_off_candidate is not none and (contextual_on_candidate | float) > (contextual_off_candidate | float) }}
variables.threshold_source: {% if apply_learning_hard %}hard_learning_anchor{% elif contract_cycle_valid %}cycle_contract_helpers{% elif contextual_contract_valid %}contextual_contract_recalc{% else %}no_disponible{% endif %}
variables.cool_on_final: {% if apply_learning_hard %}{{ hard_new_on_clamped }}{% elif threshold_source == 'cycle_contract_helpers' %}{{ contract_cycle_on | round(2) }}{% elif threshold_source == 'contextual_contract_recalc' %}{{ contextual_on_candidate }}{% else %}{{ none }}{% endif %}
variables.cool_off_final: {% if apply_learning_hard %}{{ hard_new_off_clamped }}{% elif threshold_source == 'cycle_contract_helpers' %}{{ contract_cycle_off | round(2) }}{% elif threshold_source == 'contextual_contract_recalc' %}{{ contextual_off_candidate }}{% else %}{{ none }}{% endif %}
variables.contract_values_valid: {{ cool_on_final is not none and cool_off_final is not none and (cool_on_final | float) > (cool_off_final | float) and (cool_off_final | float) >= 22 and (cool_off_final | float) <= 25.7 and (cool_on_final | float) <= 26.2 }}
variables.contract_invalid_reason: {% if cool_on_final is none or cool_off_final is none %}missing_contract_values{% else %}reject_invalid_contract_values{% endif %}
variables.diagnostic_snapshot_trace: {% set warns = [] %}{% if not snapshot_structure_ok %}{% set warns = warns + ['snapshot_missing'] %}{% endif %}{% if snapshot_structure_ok and not snapshot_trace_matches_confirmed %}{% set warns = warns + ['trace_mismatch'] %}{% endif %}{% if snapshot_structure_ok and not snapshot_event_type_ok %}{% set warns = warns + ['event_type_unconfirmed'] %}{% endif %}{{ warns | join('+') if warns | count > 0 else 'ok' }}
variables.learning_type: {% if apply_learning_hard and force_policy_active %}manual_on_learning_hard_anchor_force_learn_contract_v1{% elif apply_learning_hard %}manual_on_learning_hard_anchor_contract_v1{% elif apply_learning_normal and force_policy_active and not dynamic_helpers_ready %}manual_on_learning_applied_force_learn_fallback_bucket_missing_v1{% elif apply_learning_normal and force_policy_active %}manual_on_learning_applied_force_learn_contract_v1{% elif apply_learning_normal and not dynamic_helpers_ready %}manual_on_learning_applied_fallback_bucket_missing_v1{% elif apply_learning_normal %}manual_on_learning_applied_contract_v1{% elif event_already_processed %}manual_on_learning_ignored_duplicate_event_contract_v1{% elif not learning_day_scope_ok %}manual_on_learning_ignored_out_of_scope_daytime_main_contract_v1{% elif not final_mode_cool_required %}manual_on_learning_ignored_final_mode_not_cool_contract_v1{% elif not manual_event_confirmed %}manual_on_learning_ignored_manual_event_not_confirmed_contract_v1{% else %}manual_on_learning_ignored_unknown_contract_v1{% endif %}
variables.learning_internal_error: {{ apply_learning and (context_after is none or cool_on_final is none or cool_off_final is none) }}
variables.controlled_error_detected: {{ learning_internal_error or (apply_learning_normal and (not dynamic_delta_helper_exists) and (not fallback_delta_helper_exists)) }}
variables.learning_reason_code: {% if controlled_error_detected %}learning_on_internal_error{% elif apply_learning_hard %}manual_on_hard_anchor_applied{% elif apply_learning_normal and not dynamic_helpers_ready %}manual_on_learning_applied_fallback_bucket_missing_v1{% elif apply_learning_normal %}manual_on_normal_applied{% elif not active_session_ttl_valid and not final_mode_cool_required %}manual_on_session_expired_without_cool{% elif not learning_day_scope_ok %}out_of_scope_daytime_main{% elif not final_mode_cool_required %}final_mode_not_cool{% elif event_already_processed %}event_already_processed{% elif trace_mismatch_cross_run %}trace_mismatch_cross_run{% elif not manual_event_confirmed %}manual_event_not_confirmed{% else %}learning_gate_closed{% endif %}
variables.final_result_label: {% if controlled_error_detected %}error_controlado{% elif apply_learning %}aplicado{% else %}ignorado{% endif %}
variables.final_reason_label: {% if controlled_error_detected %}learning_on_internal_error{% elif apply_learning_hard and force_policy_active %}manual_on_hard_anchor_applied_force_learn{% elif apply_learning_hard %}manual_on_hard_anchor_applied{% elif apply_learning_normal and force_policy_active %}manual_on_normal_applied_force_learn{% elif apply_learning_normal %}manual_on_normal_applied{% elif not active_session_ttl_valid and not final_mode_cool_required %}manual_on_session_expired_without_cool{% elif not learning_day_scope_ok %}out_of_scope_daytime_main{% elif not final_mode_cool_required %}final_mode_not_cool{% elif event_already_processed %}event_already_processed{% elif trace_mismatch_cross_run %}trace_mismatch_cross_run{% elif not manual_event_confirmed %}manual_event_not_confirmed{% else %}learning_gate_closed{% endif %}
